name: TrueCar, Inc.
description: TrueCar, Inc. is an American automotive digital marketplace that provides comprehensive pricing and information for new and used car buyers. Headquartered in Santa Monica, California, the company connects consumers with a nationwide network of certified dealers, offering transparent pricing data to facilitate informed purchasing decisions. By leveraging data-driven insights, TrueCar aims to simplify the car-buying process, helping users compare vehicle prices, view inventory, and connect with local dealerships. The platform serves as a vital resource for both consumers seeking fair market value and dealers looking to reach a broader audience of ready-to-buy customers.
